text.title: Decomposition: Django Monolith to Bounded Apps Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the Django repo above the decomposition threshold (>25k LOC, >6 apps, ownership leakage)?

conclusion.verdict: skip — no team boundary to enforce
draft a boundary map from owners.yaml
add contracts/ modules and import-linter contract

text.example: Repo has orders/payments/users with payments→orders coupling. Owner map: payments=core, orders=commerce. Forbidden edge: payments→orders. Refund model lives in orders but pays-flow logic is in payments. Move Refund: new file in payments/models.py + RunPython renames ContentType from orders.refund to payments.refund + updates FK from Order.refund_set to via contracts function. importlinter.ini forbids payments→orders direct import; only payments→orders.contracts allowed.
